use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING CORONARY ARTERY DISEASE

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
KATERZIA is indicated for the treatment of hypertension in adults and children 6 years and older, to lower
blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events,
primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been see...
